data.title: Vox Royalty Posts Record 2025 Results on Strong Royalty and Streaming Growth
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Vox Royalty ( (TSE:VOXR) ) has provided an announcement.

Vox Royalty reported record 2025 results, with royalty and net precious metal receipts climbing to $16.6 million and gross profit rising to $10.1 million, driven by a commodity mix led by gold and supported by copper and iron ore. The company also delivered record operating cash flow and adjusted EBITDA for both the full year and fourth quarter, reflecting strong organic growth across its portfolio and increased exposure to cash-flowing assets.

Management highlighted early 2026 milestones including an amendment to its second Greenstone offtake stream, new Australian royalty acquisitions, full repayment of its revolving credit facility, and inclusion in a major junior gold miners index. These developments, combined with a strengthened balance sheet and scalable model, position Vox for enhanced operating leverage and underscore its improving profile among institutional and index investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:VOXR) stock is a Buy with a C$8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vox Royalty stock, see the TSE:VOXR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VOXR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VOXR is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial structure and strong gross/EBITDA margins, but is held back by ongoing net losses and a significant swing to negative free cash flow. Technicals are a notable positive with a strong uptrend and positive momentum, while valuation remains pressured due to negative earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on VOXR stock, click here.

More about Vox Royalty

Vox Royalty Corp. is a returns-focused mining royalty and streaming company with a diversified portfolio of more than 70 royalties and streams, including 12 producing and 24 development-stage assets. Founded in 2014, it primarily targets gold and select industrial metals in top-tier mining jurisdictions, leveraging a technically driven team and proprietary royalty database to deliver risk-adjusted, long-term returns for shareholders.

YTD Price Performance: 1.36%

Average Trading Volume: 29,893

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$458.1M

data.title: Village Farms Cuts Loan Cost and Extends FCC Financing to 2031
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Village Farms International ( (VFF) ) has shared an announcement.

Village Farms International has secured improved terms on its long‑standing loan with Farm Credit Canada, cutting the interest rate by 50 basis points and extending the maturity to February 2031 on a US$15.4 million facility. The loan now carries a variable rate below 7.0%, with all other key conditions unchanged, giving the company more favorable financing and longer runway to support its growth plans.

Management framed the amendment as a sign of both lender confidence and the strengthening of Village Farms’ business, which it expects to continue expanding in 2026. The enhanced loan structure should bolster liquidity and financial flexibility as the company pursues its cannabis, plant-based products and clean energy strategies across Canada, Europe and the United States, potentially reinforcing its competitive standing in these markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (VFF) stock is a Hold with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Village Farms International stock, see the VFF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VFF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VFF is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak cash flow conversion and contracting revenue (financial performance) and by soft technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD). These are partially offset by a constructive earnings-call outlook highlighting record profitability, strong operational execution, and capacity-driven growth initiatives.

To see Spark’s full report on VFF stock, click here.

More about Village Farms International

Village Farms International, Inc. is a global player in cannabis, plant-based consumer packaged goods and sustainable innovation, leveraging decades of controlled-environment agriculture and Dutch farming expertise. The company operates more than seven million square feet of greenhouse and indoor cultivation assets, making it one of the largest and most profitable cannabis operators worldwide.

In Canada, Village Farms runs one of the largest EU‑GMP certified cannabis facilities from its Delta, British Columbia campus and exports to international medical markets while holding leading market share in dried flower formats. It also owns a broad Canadian brand portfolio, is one of only ten licensed cannabis operators in the Netherlands, runs the CBDistillery hemp‑derived wellness brand in the U.S., operates a Clean Energy division converting landfill gas to renewable natural gas, and holds an equity stake in Vanguard Food LP.

Average Trading Volume: 1,187,675

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $308.5M

data.title: Briscoe Group Confirms Final NZD/AUD Rate for Six-Month Dividend
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Briscoe Group Limited ( (AU:BGP) ).

Briscoe Group Australasia has updated its previously announced final dividend details for holders of its ordinary fully paid shares listed on the ASX as a foreign exempt NZX security. The revision reflects the actual NZD/AUD exchange rate that will be applied to the six-month period dividend for the financial period ended 25 January 2026, clarifying the payout conversion for Australian investors and providing greater certainty over the final cash distribution.

The dividend relates to a six-month reporting period ending 25 January 2026, with an ex-date of 19 March 2026 and a record date of 20 March 2026 already set. By confirming the final exchange rate rather than relying on an estimate, Briscoe Group improves transparency around cross-border dividend flows, which may support investor confidence and aid portfolio planning for shareholders exposed to currency movements between New Zealand and Australia.

More about Briscoe Group Limited

Briscoe Group Australasia Limited is a New Zealand-based retail group listed as a foreign exempt issuer on the ASX. The company operates in the consumer retail sector, primarily through its branded homeware and sporting goods stores, targeting household and lifestyle consumers across Australasian markets.

Average Trading Volume: 256

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$865.5M

data.title: TFI International Sets Date for First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Webcast
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

TFI International ( (TSE:TFII) ) has shared an update.

TFI International said it will publish its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026 after markets close on April 27, 2026, followed by a webcast with Chairman and CEO Alain Bédard and CFO David Saperstein at 5:00 p.m. Eastern to discuss the quarter. The scheduled release and management webcast signal continued transparency for investors and provide an opportunity for stakeholders to assess operating trends across its less-than-truckload, truckload and logistics businesses in the context of North American freight demand and acquisition-driven growth.

The webcast will be accessible live and via replay through the Investors section of TFI International’s website, aligning the company with common capital markets practices for earnings communications. By highlighting leadership participation and broad online access, TFI aims to engage a wide base of analysts and shareholders, potentially influencing market perception of its execution and positioning in the competitive transportation and logistics sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:TFII) stock is a Buy with a C$159.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TFI International stock, see the TSE:TFII Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TFII Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TFII is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial fundamentals (strong revenue rebound and sustained free cash flow) but capped by notable margin compression and higher leverage. Technical indicators are mixed with weak near-term momentum, and valuation appears elevated versus current profitability. The latest earnings call adds caution due to soft near-term guidance and ongoing freight headwinds, partially offset by strong cash generation and shareholder returns.

To see Spark’s full report on TFII stock, click here.

More about TFI International

TFI International Inc. is a leading North American transportation and logistics company operating across the United States, Canada and Mexico through a network of wholly owned subsidiaries. The company focuses on less-than-truckload, truckload and logistics services, leveraging strategic acquisitions and shared financial and operational resources to drive efficiency and growth for its portfolio of carriers, and its shares trade on both the NYSE and TSX under the symbol TFII.

data.title: Star Diamond Advances Pre-Feasibility Work and Updates Resources in 2025 Results
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Star Diamond ( (TSE:DIAM) ) is now available.

Star Diamond reported its 2025 year-end financial and operating results, highlighting continued technical work on the Star–Orion South Diamond Project, which remains under care and maintenance. The company’s team is concentrating on integrating a revised mineral resource estimate, based on updated trench cutter data, into a re-optimized open-pit mine plan and subsequent economic assessments that will underpin future development decisions.

The company is advancing a pre-feasibility study on the Star–Orion South project, with a $3 million budget and external engineering support, though completion is contingent on securing financing and contractor availability. Other assets within the Fort à la Corne and Buffalo Hills projects saw no material developments in 2025, while leadership changes late in the year, including the retirement of the chair, president and CEO, signal an ongoing corporate transition as Star Diamond refines its path toward a potential production decision.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:DIAM) stock is a Sell with a C$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Star Diamond stock, see the TSE:DIAM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DIAM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DIAM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses, and negative cash flow), partially offset by very low leverage and improved equity position. Technicals are mixed/neutral with the stock below longer-term moving averages, and valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on DIAM stock, click here.

More about Star Diamond

Star Diamond Corporation is a Canadian natural resource company focused on exploring and evaluating diamond deposits in Saskatchewan and Alberta. Its key asset is a 100% interest in the Fort à la Corne Project in central Saskatchewan, including the Star–Orion South Diamond Project, complemented by a full interest in the Buffalo Hills Diamond Project in north‑central Alberta, both situated near established infrastructure that could support future mine development.

YTD Price Performance: -14.29%

data.title: New Talisman Raises NZ$1.28m in Rights Issue, Opens Shortfall to Investors
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

New Talisman Gold Mines Limited ( (NZ:NTL) ) has issued an announcement.

New Talisman Gold Mines has completed an allotment of 79,765,781 new shares following a 4-for-5 rights issue, increasing total shares on issue to 791,606,719 and raising NZ$1.28 million from entitlements and additional applications. A substantial shortfall of 489,706,969 shares remains available for subscription on the same terms until 2 April 2026, providing further capital-raising capacity for the company.

The board plans to use the funds raised to advance key phases of its strategic plan, although it notes that about NZ$7.6 million is required to fully deliver that strategy. Geological modelling at the Talisman Gold Mine and preparation for targeted underground drilling are underway, and the company intends to further outline its strategic direction to investors at the NZX Resources and Exploration Investor Day in Auckland on 24 April 2026.

More about New Talisman Gold Mines Limited

New Talisman Gold Mines Limited is a New Zealand-based mining company focused on the exploration and development of the Talisman Gold Mine. The company is advancing geological modelling and planning targeted underground drilling on the Crown and Welcome Lodes as part of a broader strategic plan to progress its gold mining operations.

Average Trading Volume: 471,372

Current Market Cap: N$19.22M

Downer EDI Limited ( (AU:DOW) ) has provided an announcement.

L1 Capital Pty Ltd and L1 Capital Strategic Equity Management Pty Ltd have increased their substantial shareholding in Downer EDI Limited through a series of on-market purchases in March 2026. Following these transactions, their combined relevant interest has risen to 45,588,566 fully paid ordinary shares, representing 6.89% of Downer EDI’s issued capital.

The buying, executed via multiple broker nominees including Merrill Lynch, Morgan Stanley, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and others, reflects growing institutional exposure to Downer EDI. The move consolidates L1 Capital’s position as a significant stakeholder, potentially enhancing its influence over voting outcomes and signalling continued fund-manager confidence in the company’s prospects.

More about Downer EDI Limited

Downer EDI Limited is an Australian-listed engineering and infrastructure services provider operating across sectors such as transport, utilities and facilities management. The company delivers outsourced maintenance, construction and asset management services to public and private sector clients, with its shares widely held by institutional investors in the Australasian market.

data.title: EagleOne Seals Deal for Utah Uranium Asset to Bolster Critical Minerals Portfolio
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

EagleOne Metals Corporation ( (TSE:EAGL) ) has shared an update.

EagleOne Metals Corporation has completed the acquisition of a 100% interest in the Poison Springs Uranium Project in southeastern Utah, securing ten mineral claims over 206.6 acres for US$50,000. The project lies within a sandstone-hosted uranium district in Triassic Chinle Formation rocks, an area with historical mining and exploration activity.

Historical work on the property includes a small-scale 1960s uranium mining operation and a 2008 drill program that intersected shallow uranium mineralization with grades reported up to about 0.18% eU₃O₈ over several feet. While EagleOne has not yet independently verified these historical results, the company views the district-scale uranium and associated critical metals potential as a strategic platform for systematic exploration and portfolio growth in a key U.S. jurisdiction.

More about EagleOne Metals Corporation

EagleOne Metals Corporation is a mineral exploration company focused on critical minerals, including uranium and rare earth elements, with projects in established mining regions such as the United States. The company aims to build a diversified portfolio of assets and apply modern exploration techniques and advanced data analysis to increase discovery success across commodities tied to the global energy and digital economy.

Average Trading Volume: 35,131

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$12.97M

See more insights into EAGL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Capital Trust to Close Trading Window Ahead of FY26 Results
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Capital Trust Ltd. (India) ( (IN:CAPTRUST) ).

Capital Trust Limited has announced that its trading window for dealing in the company’s shares will be closed for designated persons, their immediate relatives and others with access to unpublished price-sensitive information from 1 April 2026. This restriction will remain in force until 48 hours after the declaration of the company’s financial results and annual accounts for the quarter and year ended 31 March 2026, in line with SEBI’s insider trading regulations and the firm’s internal code of conduct.

The company has indicated that the date of the board meeting to approve these financial results will be communicated in due course. The move underscores Capital Trust’s adherence to regulatory requirements on trading restrictions during sensitive periods, aiming to prevent insider trading and protect market integrity for its shareholders and other market participants.

More about Capital Trust Ltd. (India)

Capital Trust Limited is an India-listed financial services company whose shares trade on the National Stock Exchange under the symbol CAPTRUST and on BSE under scrip code 511505. The company operates under the regulatory framework of SEBI and is subject to insider trading and disclosure norms applicable to publicly traded financial institutions in India.

Average Trading Volume: 13,681

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 519.5M INR
